title: UTV2-695 — PostgREST 1000-row cap: split loadEventOffers + MLB player-prop fix

assertions.claim: loadEventOffers split into two parallel queries — game-level (IS NULL) + player-prop (IS NOT NULL)

evidence.db_audit: Braves @ Nationals: 8 ML, 8 spread, 24 game total, 90 1H rows confirmed present within 2h window — all previously silently dropped

assertions.claim: mapOfferToFormMarketType detects MLB player props via marketTypeId prefix + providerParticipantId fallback

evidence.fix: marketTypeId.startsWith('player_') || marketTypeId.startsWith('player.') -> 'player-prop'; providerParticipantId fallback when participantId null
evidence.tests: 3 new tests in apps/smart-form/test/form-utils.test.ts — all pass

assertions.claim: upsertBatch chunked in 500-row batches to avoid Supabase statement timeout

evidence.fix: chunk(records, 500) with sequential upsert per chunk

assertions.claim: next.config.ts replaced with next.config.mjs in command-center (Next.js 14 TypeScript config unsupported)

verdict: PASS — PostgREST 1000-row cap bypassed via split query. Game-level markets (ML, spread, totals, 1H, F5) now returned for all events. MLB player-prop classification fixed.
